notes: All 9 responses correctly capture the core chart (axes ranges, three series, acidification trend). Recurring errors: (1) ocean pCO₂ end value inflated to ~400-420 ppm (actual ~380); (2) two responses (t0.4|rep0, t0.7|rep2) misassign pCO₂ to the right/pH axis when it actually shares the left CO₂ axis; (3) several invent inflection points or tick-spacing details. t0.4|rep0 uniquely corrupts pCO₂ into '~8.13 pH-equivalent' nonsense. t0.4|rep2 is the standout: accurate values and no fabrications.
